tool.name: EnzyWizard Embedding
tool.description: Generate protein sequence embeddings using ESM-2
tool.help:
**EnzyWizard-Embedding**
Generates protein sequence embeddings using pretrained ESM-2 protein language models. Supports three model sizes: esm2_t6_8M_UR50D, esm2_t12_35M_UR50D, and esm2_t30_150M_UR50D.
**Inputs** - Cleaned protein sequence in FASTA format.
**Outputs** - JSON report with residue embeddings.
For more information, see the `enzywizard-embedding` documentation: https://github.com/bioinfbrad/enzywizard-embedding
